title: Jake Holtz
html:
Jake Holtz

Stub. Cited in 2025 08 29 irl lore as someone Cam had "gone through something with" — Yahir invokes the Cam-Jake-Holtz history alongside his dad's "never do business with friends" rule when reasoning about whether Cam can carry his weight on brotein. Likely a Cam-orbit friend whose friendship-business overlap went south.
